title: One Way or Another
why_this_song: One Way or Another by Blondie (1978) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'm gonna give you the slip
A slip of the hip or another, I'm gonna lose ya
I'm gonna trick ya, I'll trick ya
One way, or another, I'm gonna lose ya
One way, or another, I'm gonna find ya
I'm gonna get ya, get ya, get ya, get ya
One way, or another, I'm gonna win ya
I'm gonna get ya, get ya, get ya, get ya

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "another" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "another" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: One way, or another, I'm gonna find ya
I'm gonna give you the slip

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "One Way or Another" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "One Way or Another" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "One Way or Another" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "One Way or Another", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "One Way or Another" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "One Way or Another" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
